info.address: CSE Department, College Campus, Karnataka, India

faq.question: How can I join Code Troopers?
faq.answer: Membership is open to all students interested in technology. Watch for recruitment announcements at the start of each semester. The process includes application submission, screening, interview, team allocation, and a 30-day probation period.

faq.question: What is the Workbench platform?
faq.answer: Workbench is Code Troopers' internal learning ecosystem — a platform for structured roadmaps, skill assessments, project tracking, and member progress. It is maintained by the Workbench Team.

faq.question: Do I need prior coding experience?
faq.answer: No prior experience is required for general membership. We have structured learning pathways for beginners through advanced levels. Passion and commitment matter most.

faq.question: What is the attendance requirement?
faq.answer: General members must maintain 75% attendance. Team Leads and Co-Leads must maintain 85%. Attendance includes meetings, workshops, club activities, and project reviews.

faq.question: How are events organized?
faq.answer: All events follow the official Code Troopers Event Protocol — from planning and HOD approval to registration, attendance, documentation, and closure reports.

faq.question: Can I propose a workshop or event?
faq.answer: Yes! Any member can propose an activity. Submit your idea to the Events & Operations Team lead, who will guide you through the approval workflow.
